section 417(e) applicable mortality table IRS notice unisex mortality 2026
contract_notes: Use the current public mortality_417e contract: a single default variant with an ordered array of objects containing age and qx.

This public entry currently exposes a unisex qx series only. If the primary IRS source publishes separate male and female static tables or a broader age range, map the reviewed values into the current public row set rather than marking schema_change_required solely for that reason.
Preserve ages in strictly increasing order and express qx as decimal probabilities, not percentages.
